arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Sociedad 0 - 2 Real Madrid Post-game, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Siddharth Ramsundar discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Three questions and three answers from Real Sociedad 0-2 Real Madrid
arts.sum: It came courtesy of two penalties, with Vinícius Júnior converting the first following a handball blocking an Arda Güler shot, and then Kylian Mbappé scoring the second after the Brazilian goalscorer had been felled inside the box. The coach surprised with his selection, unexpectedly dropping Rodrygo Goes to the bench and opting to bring in both players in a shape which looked more like a 4-2-3-1 with Valverde slightly deeper than Modrić and the other two ahead alongside Vinícius Júnior with Kylian Mbappé as the number nine.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Real Madrid didn’t deserve to win against Real Sociedad”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti did not hold back in his assessment of his team’s 2-0 win over Real Sociedad, saying, “it was a complicated match. And I value that a lot, because it’s not easy to find commitment in a team with so much quality.

arts.ttl: The Numbers Narrative: Real Sociedad 0-2 Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Sociedad’s pressing and 47.52% field tilt nearly troubled Madrid, but two penalties from Vinícius and Mbappé secured a narrow 2-0 victory. In a match where Los Blancos struggled for large portions, two second-half penalty goals from Vinícius Júnior and Kylian Mbappé ultimately saved the day.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad 0-2 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Mbappe scores
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior and Kylian Mbappe both score from the penalty spot to fire Real Madrid to a 2-0 victory over Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Real Sociedad 0-2 Real Madrid
arts.sum: The game started at a decent pace, with Kylian Mbappé spurning the first good chance, giving the keeper an easy save. The woodwork would be needed again to save Real Madrid as Sociedad hit the bar with a close ranged effort.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Sociedad have endured a difficult start to 2024/25 themselves, accumulating just a win and a draw from their opening four games. Real Madrid already find themselves chasing Clasico rivals Barcelona at the summit of La Liga and will want to close the gap this Saturday when they visit Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Costacurta ranks Inter third in Champions League, behind only City and Real Madrid
arts.sum: Former AC Milan defender Alessandro Costacurta shared his thoughts on the upcoming Champions League season in an interview with Sportweek, the weekly magazine of La Gazzetta dello Sport. Costacurta expressed his hope for Italian football’s resurgence in the competition, stating, “I hope our football returns to dominate this competition. But it can only succeed in one way: by playing many Italians. So my wish is that more and more Italians play in the Champions League.” Regarding the new Champions League format, Costacurta is optimistic: “I like the idea of this new Champions League. arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Sociedad vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: All set for what’s expected to be a tough away game for Real Madrid. Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Carvajal, Rudiger, Militao, Mendy, Valverde, Modric, Guler, Brahim, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid and Barcelona to battle for Euro 2024 winner
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barcelona are both interested in signing central midfielder Fabian Ruiz, who played a starring role for Spain at Euro 2024, reports in Spain have claimed. Spanish publication SPORT report that Fabian, who has three years remaining on his PSG contract, is of interest to Real Madrid, despite the abundance of midfield riches already at Carlo Ancelotti's disposal.
